hero.title: Every bite has a purpose
hero.subtitle: Artisanal burgers that transform premium ingredients into experiences with flavor and social impact. Since 2015, we've donated over R$200,000 to socio-environmental causes.

impact.title: Flavor with purpose
impact.subtitle: For every burger sold, R$1 is donated to socio-environmental projects in partnership with ICOM Floripa.

highlights.title: Our highlights
highlights.subtitle: Real artisanal burgers with Black Angus beef, homemade mayo, and fresh-baked buns.

t1.text: A thousand points! For the taste, quality, atmosphere and care. The burger is impeccable, delicious.
t1.author: Vivian B.

t2.text: We found them through iFood and were blown away! Super attentive, impeccable taste and generous portions.
t2.author: Karolyna A.

t3.text: Incredible burgers, perfect service. The atmosphere is welcoming and the social cause makes everything even better.
t3.author: iFood Customer

history_page.title: Our Story
history_page.subtitle: From 3 friends passionate about burgers to 4 locations and over R$200,000 donated.
history_page.origin_text: In 2015, three friends tired of the usual bread-meat-cheese-lettuce combo decided to create something different. Usina do Hamburguer was born, an artisanal burger joint with purpose: for every burger sold, R$1 would be donated to socio-environmental causes.
history_page.growth_text: From the first location in Trindade, next to UFSC, Usina grew to 4 locations in Santa Catarina. Today we have 24 team members and over 39,000 social media followers.
history_page.impact_text: Through the Usina do Hamburguer Fund, in partnership with ICOM Floripa, over R$200,000 has been donated to animal protection, environmental and social inclusion projects.
history_page.pet_text: Because our love for animals goes beyond donations. We created the Pet Burger: a special burger for your best four-legged friend.
